empty.noTournaments: You don't have any assigned tournaments.
empty.createFirst: Create your first one with the button below.

explanation.introPadel: 🎯 The simulation ordered players by skill level and sought the perfect balance by analyzing historical matchups and pairings.
explanation.introFootball: 🎯 The algorithm exhaustively evaluated possible player combinations to minimize level differences between teams.
explanation.calcPadel: 📊 Individual level = win % + experience bonus + streaks. Chemistry = average win % when playing together as a pair.
explanation.calcFootball: 📊 Strength score = win % + exp. bonus (up to +10 pts) + streak bonus (×1.5 per win). Chemistry = weighted win rate in duo.
explanation.strength: ⚖️ Average strength — Team A: {{avgA}} pts · Team B: {{avgB}} pts (difference: {{diff}} pts).
explanation.chemistry: 🤝 Historical chemistry — Team A: {{chemA}}% win together · Team B: {{chemB}}% win together.
explanation.starA: ⭐ Team A Star: {{name}} ({{winPct}}% win, max streak {{streak}}, {{matches}} P).
explanation.starB: ⭐ Team B Star: {{name}} ({{winPct}}% win, max streak {{streak}}, {{matches}} P).
explanation.favored: 🏆 Slight mathematical favorite: Team {{team}} ({{diff}}% more average victory).
explanation.tied: 🏆 Both teams are mathematically tied in average victory.

padel.title: Match Formats (Padel)
padel.desc: Padel is played by default in 2v2 (Pairs) modality. Currently, the platform does not support other modalities for this sport.

football.title: Match Formats (Football)
football.desc: Select the game modalities allowed in this tournament. You can have more than one active. The app will ask you to choose the format when registering a match or simulating.

confirmModal.title: Remove user from tournament
confirmModal.body: You are about to remove {{username}} from tournament {{name}}.
confirmModal.rule1: ❌ Will lose access to the tournament
confirmModal.rule2: 🗳️ All their badge votes will be deleted
